must_detect.matched_text:
Confidential internal memo — Serunai Logistics Berhad — PDPA/MNPI handling for Project Mangosteen employment changes and term financing.
This note addresses personal data obligations and non-public, price-sensitive information under the Capital Markets and Services Act (Malaysia) and the local Listing Requirements for a proposed sukuk murabahah and a warehouse asset disposal in Bandar Selasih, Negeri Temerang.
The draft disposal and Q3 revenue guidance constitute MNPI; no external sharing or selective briefing is permitted prior to the formal exchange announcement, and any board circulation must be marked “restricted” and logged.
Employment/PII: Encik Farid Johari (Operations Supervisor, staff id EMP- 1 9 7 6 -xq) has disclosed Type 1 diabetes for medical benefit claims; PDPA lawful basis is employment/benefits, and access is strictly need-to-know.
Religious data: Encik Farid identifies as Muslim and requests Friday prayer shift accommodation; HR to record consent for this limited processing and avoid inclusion in any market disclosure.
Biometric data: the GateKeeper v2 fingerprint template for Encik Farid was re-enrolled using NebulaSoft Kijang Pro; treat as biometric personal data and store with AES-256, key ref RG-7x_0 2** per Secure Vault SOP.
Union data: Encik Farid is a member of Kesatuan Pekerja Serunai Logistics; consult the union on redeployment terms consistent with the Collective Agreement.
Minor data: his daughter, Nur Aila (age 15), is added to the medical panel; do not export minor identifiers to any external data room or draft announcement.
Note: references to “genetic algorithms” in the routing engine are about software features and not about any person’s genetic data.
Financing: Draft Term Sheet (RM120,000,000 sukuk murabahah, private placement) with Bank Lembayung Islamik Berhad remains non-public and, as currently framed, does not constitute a material adverse change (MAC) under Clause 12.4 of the SPA draft.
We plan to announce Project Mangosteen upon signing; until then, directors and principal officers are within a closed period and must not trade; board pack link: https://portal.serunai-logistics.example/filing?doc=LR12%2F2026%2Fterm
The “religion of rugby” phrase in the Seri Purnama Panthers sponsorship deck is a metaphor and is not personal data; do not escalate as sensitive.
DEI note: we value diversity, equity, and inclusion; see Equal Opportunities Charter and Data Minimisation SOP; backups are handled by CloudDobi X1 consistent with our retention matrix.
Public-source references (e.g., news about the Bandar Selasih logistics park) may be cited, but they cannot be combined with internal forecasts to create implied guidance.
Please ensure the HR clinic receipts and biometric logs are redacted before any diligence upload; any OCR artefacts (e.g., “Fa rid”) should be treated as the same data subject in our register.
All emails on this topic must carry the “MNPI—Internal Only” tag; circulate on a need-to-know basis and avoid chat channels that auto-sync to personal devices.
Contact: Ms. Suriya Ramlan, Compliance Lead, compliance@serunai-logistics.example, tel +60-3- 88 4 0 1 9 2 (internal) for PDPA/CMSA queries; ticket ref LEG-PRJ/ 20 26
